summary: Ideal lead: a parent (or motivated wrestler) seeking 1-on-1 mental performance coaching for a middle school or high school wrestler with real tournament ambition, near-term goals, and emotional readiness to start now. Strong fit shows mental struggle (confidence, choking, anxiety in big matches), specific wrestling context, and investment in high-performance coaching — not generic interest or book-only subscribers.
positive_signals: Near-term deadline (this month, next month, Fargo, state, nationals)
Detailed message about confidence, choking, big matches, or mindset before competition
7+ years experience or serious competitive path (state, Fargo, etc.)
negative_signals: Email-only subscriber with no coaching form fields
Coach seeking team-only training without 1-on-1 fit
No wrestling context or vague curiosity only
HubSpot Unqualified with no coaching story

reference_leads.label: Bo Baskett — ICP archetype
reference_leads.message: We need to get Bo's mindset right before Fargo. He struggles with confidence and chokes in big matches. He has the talent but struggles against guys at or above his level. He needs to take the next step mentally before Fargo.
reasons: Perfect ICP: parent buyer, mental struggle, urgent timeline, high-performance intent
Score leads like this in the 88-95 range unless clear disqualifiers
